name: css-module-explainer
description: Go to Definition, Hover, Autocomplete, Diagnostics, Quick Fixes, and Find References for classnames/bind cx() patterns with CSS Modules.

scripts.build: pnpm cme-check run core/clean && rolldown -c rolldown.config.ts && pnpm cme-check run core/build/engine-shadow-runner
scripts.check:plugin-consumers: pnpm cme-check run plugin/consumer-example && pnpm cme-check run plugin/eslint-plugin-smoke && pnpm cme-check run plugin/stylelint-plugin-smoke
scripts.check:ts7-phase-a-readiness: pnpm cme-check run workspace/backend-typecheck-smoke && pnpm cme-check run contract/type-fact-backend-parity && pnpm cme-check run rust/gate/evidence -- --variant tsgo --repeat 1 --json
scripts.check:ts7-phase-a-shadow: pnpm cme-check run tsgo/release-batch && pnpm cme-check run tsgo/real-project-corpus && pnpm cme-check run tsgo/lsp-server-smoke
scripts.check:ts7-phase-a-tsgo-lane: pnpm cme-check run core/build && pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/readiness && pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/shadow && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-a/stability
scripts.check:ts7-phase-a-decision-ready: pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/tsgo-lane && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-a/shadow-review
scripts.check:ts7-phase-b-protocol-tsgo: CME_TYPE_FACT_BACKEND=tsgo pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/lifecycle.test.ts test/protocol/hover.test.ts test/protocol/definition.test.ts test/protocol/diagnostics.test.ts test/protocol/completion.test.ts
scripts.check:ts7-phase-b-editing-tsgo: CME_TYPE_FACT_BACKEND=tsgo pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/references.test.ts test/protocol/rename.test.ts test/protocol/code-actions.test.ts
scripts.check:ts7-phase-b-readiness: pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/decision-ready && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/protocol@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/editing@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/build@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/workspace-build@tsgo
scripts.check:ts7-phase-c-watch-tsgo: CME_TYPE_FACT_BACKEND=tsgo pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/file-watcher.test.ts test/protocol/source-watcher-semantic-reference.test.ts test/protocol/semantic-reference-staleness.test.ts
scripts.check:ts7-phase-c-readiness: pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-c/long-lived@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-c/workspace-edge@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-c/watch@tsgo
scripts.check:tsgo-operational-lane: pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/tsgo-lane && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/protocol@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/editing@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/build@tsgo && pnpm cme-check run ts7/phase-b/workspace-build@tsgo && pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-c/readiness
scripts.check:ts7-decision-ready: pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-a/decision-ready && pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-b/readiness && pnpm cme-check bundle ts7/phase-c/readiness
scripts.check:rust-workspace: cargo fmt --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --all --check && cargo check --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.check:rust-omena-abstract-value-split-bo: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-abstract-value/domain && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-abstract-value/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-omena-query-boundary: cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -p omena-query && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/adapter-capabilities && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/runner-boundary
scripts.check:rust-omena-query-split-boundary: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-omena-resolver-boundary: cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -p omena-resolver && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-resolver/runner-boundary
scripts.check:rust-omena-resolver-split-boundary: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-resolver/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-resolver/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-omena-bridge-split-boundary: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-bridge/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-bridge/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-omena-semantic-split-boundary: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-observation-harness && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-publish-readiness && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-parser-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/scaffold && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/parity-lite && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/css-modules-intermediate && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/evaluator-candidates && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/canonical-producer
scripts.check:rust-parser-public-product: pnpm cme-check bundle rust/parser/lane && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/consumer-boundary
scripts.check:rust-parser-split-boundary: pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/public-product && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-checker-style-recovery-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-recovery/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-recovery/canonical-producer && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-recovery/consumer-boundary
scripts.check:rust-checker-source-missing-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-source-missing/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-source-missing/canonical-producer && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-source-missing/consumer-boundary
scripts.check:rust-checker-style-unused-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-unused/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-unused/canonical-producer && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker-style-unused/consumer-boundary
scripts.check:rust-checker-bounded-lanes: pnpm cme-check bundle rust/checker-style-recovery/lane && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/checker-source-missing/lane && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/checker-style-unused/lane
scripts.check:rust-checker-promotion-evidence: pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/promotion-review && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/broader-lane-readiness && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/real-project-bounded
scripts.check:rust-checker-release-gate-shadow: pnpm cme-check bundle rust/release/bundle && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/entrance && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/promotion-evidence && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/release-gate-readiness
scripts.check:rust-source-side-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/source-side/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/source-side/evaluator-candidates && pnpm cme-check run rust/source-side/canonical-producer
scripts.check:rust-semantic-lane: pnpm cme-check run rust/semantic/canonical-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/semantic/evaluator-candidates && pnpm cme-check run rust/semantic/canonical-producer
scripts.check:rust-input-producers-split-boundar: pnpm cme-check bundle rust/producer-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/input-producers/git-consumer
scripts.check:rust-producer-boundary: cargo test --manifest-path rust/Cargo.toml -p engine-input-producers && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/source-side/lane && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/semantic/lane
scripts.check:rust-split-boundaries: pnpm cme-check bundle rust/omena-abstract-value/split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/input-producers/split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/parser/split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/omena-semantic-split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/omena-bridge/split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/omena-resolver/split-boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/omena-query/split-boundary
scripts.check:rust-lane-bundle: pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-abstract-value/domain && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-resolver/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/producer-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/public-product && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-bridge/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-publish-readiness && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/entrance
scripts.check:rust-release-bundle: pnpm cme-check run rust/workspace && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-abstract-value/domain && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-resolver/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-query/boundary && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/producer-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/parser/public-product && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-bridge/boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/omena-semantic-publish-readiness && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/entrance && pnpm cme-check run rust/gate/evidence -- --variant typescript-current --repeat 1 --json
scripts.check:selected-query-boundary: pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/definition.test.ts test/protocol/hover.test.ts test/protocol/completion.test.ts test/protocol/references.test.ts test/protocol/rename.test.ts test/protocol/code-lens.test.ts test/protocol/code-lens-refresh.test.ts
scripts.check:rust-lsp-runtime-loop: pnpm cme-check run core/build && node --import tsx ./scripts/check-lsp-runtime-loop.ts
scripts.check:rust-selected-query-protocol: pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/warmup && CME_ENGINE_SHADOW_RUNNER=prebuilt CME_SELECTED_QUERY_BACKEND=rust-selected-query pnpm cme-check run test/protocol
scripts.check:rust-selected-query-daemon-protoco: pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/warmup && CME_ENGINE_SHADOW_RUNNER=prebuilt CME_ENGINE_SHADOW_RUNNER_DAEMON=1 CME_SELECTED_QUERY_BACKEND=rust-selected-query pnpm cme-check run test/protocol
scripts.check:rust-selected-query-workspace: pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/warmup && node --import tsx ./scripts/check-rust-selected-query-workspace.ts
scripts.check:rust-selected-query-release-defaul: pnpm cme-check run core/build && node ./scripts/merge-engine-shadow-runner-artifacts.mjs && pnpm cme-check run release/check/packaged-engine-shadow-runner-matrix && CME_SELECTED_QUERY_BACKEND=auto pnpm cme-check run test/protocol
scripts.check:rust-selected-query-default-candid: pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/release-default && CME_ENGINE_SHADOW_RUNNER=prebuilt pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/consumers && pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/protocol && pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/daemon-protocol && pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/runner-daemon && pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/workspace
scripts.check:rust-phase-2-swap-readiness: pnpm cme-check run editor/provider-host-routing-boundary && pnpm cme-check run rust/selected-query/default-candidate && pnpm cme-check run rust/lsp-runtime-loop && pnpm cme-check run rust/checker/release-gate-shadow
scripts.check:editor-path-boundary: pnpm cme-check run editor/selected-query-boundary && pnpm exec vitest run test/protocol/diagnostics.test.ts test/protocol/scss-diagnostics.test.ts test/protocol/code-actions.test.ts test/protocol/file-watcher.test.ts test/protocol/source-watcher-semantic-reference.test.ts test/protocol/workspace-folders.test.ts test/protocol/multi-root-settings.test.ts test/protocol/multi-root-settings-reload.test.ts test/protocol/reload-settings-reschedule.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm cme-check run core/lint && pnpm cme-check run core/format/check && pnpm cme-check run core/typecheck
scripts.package: rm -f ./*.vsix && pnpm cme-check run core/build && node ./scripts/merge-engine-shadow-runner-artifacts.mjs && pnpm cme-check run release/check/packaged-engine-shadow-runner-matrix && vsce package --no-dependencies && pnpm cme-check run release/check/packaged-selected-query-default
scripts.release:verify: ./scripts/release.sh && pnpm cme-check run core/check && pnpm cme-check run plugin/consumer-example && pnpm cme-check bundle plugin/consumers && pnpm cme-check bundle rust/release/bundle && pnpm cme-check bundle tsgo/release/bundle && pnpm cme-check run test/test && pnpm cme-check run release/package

cssModuleExplainer.features.definition.description: Enable Go to Definition for cx() class names.

cssModuleExplainer.features.hover.description: Enable hover information for cx() class names.

cssModuleExplainer.features.references.description: Enable Find References for CSS class selectors.

cssModuleExplainer.features.rename.description: Enable Rename Symbol for CSS class selectors across SCSS and TS/TSX files.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.severity.description: Severity level for unresolved class diagnostics.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.unusedSel.description: Show hints for CSS class selectors that are declared but never referenced in any TS/TSX file.

cssModuleExplainer.diagnostics.missingMo.description: Warn when 'import styles from ...' for a CSS Module cannot be resolved on disk.

cssModuleExplainer.hover.maxCandidates.description: Maximum template/variable candidates shown in hover.

cssModuleExplainer.pathAlias.markdownDescription: Resource-scoped import alias map for CSS Module paths. Keys are non-relative import prefixes, values are workspace-relative or absolute target paths.

cssModuleExplainer.scss.classnameTransfo.markdownDescription: Mirror of css-loader's `modules.localsConvention`. Controls how CSS class selectors are exposed to JS/TS — e.g. `.btn-primary` is reachable as `styles['btn-primary']` (`asIs`), both that and `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCase`), or only `styles.btnPrimary` (`camelCaseOnly`). Port your `css-loader` setting verbatim.
